project: House AC Repair - Residential HVAC SERP-Feature Takeover

clusters.content_asset: AC Repair service page (Fort Lauderdale) + GBP-linked local landing

keywords.keyword: ac repair fort lauderdale fl
air conditioning repair fort lauderdale
ac repair near me
broward county ac repair company

per_feature_tactics.local_pack: GBP optimization for AC Repair in Fort Lauderdale (primary category 'HVAC contractor' + 'Air conditioning repair service', geo-tagged photos, weekly GBP posts), drive 5-star reviews with 'AC repair Fort Lauderdale' in review text, and build/clean NAP citations (Yelp, BBB, Angi, Apple Maps, Bing Places).
per_feature_tactics.local_services: Activate & verify Google Local Services Ads (Google Guaranteed badge), license/insurance upload, and review pass-through so the LSA unit shows above the 3-pack.
per_feature_tactics.ai_overview: YouTube video 'How AC Repair Works in Fort Lauderdale' + NotebookLM source set on local HVAC repair + Cloudflare edge worker serving static HTML+Schema (LocalBusiness/HVACBusiness) at ~10ms for citability.
per_feature_tactics.people_also_ask: Treat each PAA ('How much is AC repair in Fort Lauderdale?', 'Who is the best AC repair company?') as a secondary keyword -> a YouTube chapter + an on-page H2/H3 with a 40-55 word concise answer.
per_feature_tactics.organic: Optimized AC Repair service page targeting the cluster + internal links from cost, emergency, and city-area pages.
per_feature_tactics.discussions_and_forums: Seed an authentic Reddit (r/fortlauderdale) + Nextdoor thread answering 'who to call for AC repair' to occupy the discussions block.

clusters.content_asset: Emergency 24/7 AC Repair landing page (click-to-call optimized)

keywords.keyword: 24 hour ac repair fort lauderdale

per_feature_tactics.ai_overview: YouTube video 'What to do when your AC stops cooling (Fort Lauderdale emergency)' + NotebookLM source set + Cloudflare edge worker serving static HTML+Schema (Service + LocalBusiness, areaServed Broward) at ~10ms.
per_feature_tactics.local_services: Google Local Services Ads with 24/7 hours enabled and 'emergency / same-day' service attributes so the LSA unit captures urgent clicks.
per_feature_tactics.local_pack: GBP set to 24-hour hours, 'Emergency service' attribute, recent reviews mentioning 'same day' and 'midnight'; NAP citations consistent.
per_feature_tactics.people_also_ask: Each PAA ('Is there 24 hour AC repair near me?', 'How much is emergency AC repair?') -> YouTube chapter + on-page H2/H3 concise answer with click-to-call CTA.
per_feature_tactics.video: Optimized YouTube video for 'AC not cooling emergency repair' (title, timestamped chapters, full transcript, VideoObject schema) to win the video result.
per_feature_tactics.organic: Click-to-call optimized Emergency 24/7 landing page + internal links from core AC Repair and city pages.

per_feature_tactics.ai_overview: YouTube explainer 'Evaporator coil replacement cost in Fort Lauderdale' + NotebookLM source set with cost ranges + Cloudflare edge worker static HTML+Schema (Article/FAQPage) at ~10ms for citation.
per_feature_tactics.video: Optimized YouTube explainer ('signs your evaporator coil is bad', cost breakdown) with chapters, transcript, and VideoObject schema -> wins the video result present on 3 of 4 terms.
per_feature_tactics.people_also_ask: Each PAA ('How much to replace an evaporator coil?', 'Can a leaking coil be repaired?') -> YouTube chapter + on-page H2/H3 concise answer.
per_feature_tactics.local_pack: GBP optimization + reviews mentioning 'evaporator coil' / 'coil replacement'; NAP citations for the high-intent 'who should I call' term.
per_feature_tactics.organic: Evaporator coil pillar page targeting the cluster + internal links from cost and core repair pages.
per_feature_tactics.discussions_and_forums: Seed a Reddit / HVAC forum thread on coil replacement cost to occupy the discussions block.

build_order.content_asset: Emergency 24/7 AC Repair landing page (click-to-call optimized)
build_order.rationale: Highest lead_value (3 high-intent terms) AND the richest feature stack: ai_overview on 3 terms, video, local_pack/local_services, PAA. AIO + video gaps with urgent buyer intent = top priority.

build_order.content_asset: AC Repair service page (Fort Lauderdale) + GBP-linked local landing
build_order.rationale: Core money terms, all high lead_value, dense local_pack/local_services + AIO on the head term. This is the hub all other pages link to, so it must exist early.

build_order.content_asset: Evaporator Coil Repair & Replacement pillar page + explainer video
build_order.rationale: Only cluster with featured_snippet + ai_overview + video all present, plus a high-value 'who should I call' AI-mode term. Biggest position-0 / AIO / video opportunity stack.

build_order.content_asset: AC Repair Cost guide (pricing pillar) + cost-range explainer video
build_order.rationale: AIO on 3 terms + featured_snippet + video; strong AI-mode and research demand. High GEO/snippet capture potential feeding the whole funnel.

build_order.content_asset: City service-area landing pages (Hollywood, Pompano Beach, Plantation, Coral Springs)
build_order.rationale: All high / medium_high transactional terms with local_pack + local_services on every term. Pure local-pack land-grab to expand the service footprint once the hub exists.

build_order.content_asset: AC Installation & Replacement pillar page + financing/quote CTA
build_order.rationale: Highest-ticket jobs; ai_overview on 2 terms + local_pack on the head term. Strong revenue per lead but lower query volume/urgency than repair.

build_order.content_asset: AC Maintenance & Tune-Up service page + seasonal checklist
build_order.rationale: Lower lead_value, retention/recurring play. AIO on 2 terms + local_pack/local_services; build last as a nurture/repeat-revenue asset.
